title: Spicy Middle Eastern Seitan Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with seitan, inspired by the cuisine of the Middle East. This dish is a great alternative to traditional meat stir fries.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the seitan and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the spicy Middle Eastern seasoning blend and stir to combine.
Stir in the soy sauce and rice vinegar, and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Serve with rice or noodles, if desired.
